Hero.title: CodeForge – We Turn Ideas into Code
content: We help startups and companies design, develop, and scale their digital products with modern technologies like Next.js, React, Node.js and Golang.
Our mission is to transform ideas into reliable, user-friendly software that grows with your business.
Beyond client projects, we also create our own tools to drive innovation and deliver software that stands out.

OurServices.title: Our Services
OurServices.subtitle: From design to deployment, we cover the full product lifecycle.

contentItems.title: Product Design
contentItems.content: We design intuitive interfaces and experiences.

contentItems.title: Web Development
contentItems.content: Scalable, maintainable, and modern web apps.

contentItems.title: API & Backend
contentItems.content: Robust backend solutions with Node.js and Go, and other services such as PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, etc.

contentItems.title: Cloud & Scaling
contentItems.content: Performance-driven infrastructure that grows with you.

contentItems.title: Custom Tools
contentItems.content: Tailored solutions and automation for your business.

AboutUs.title: Who We Are
contentItens: We’re a small but passionate team of technologists with a big vision.

Founded by two friends - one with over 8 years of experience in software development, and the other with a strong background in tech support and software solutions - our journey started with a simple idea: create a space where we can build our own products while helping others bring their digital ideas to life.
We’re still at the early stage, but our focus is clear:

listItems: Craft reliable, modern software with technologies we believe in.
Develop our own tools and small products that push innovation forward.
Work with clients who value quality, transparency, and creativity.

contentItens: For us, it’s not just about delivering code. It’s about building solutions that last - for ourselves, and for those who trust us to build with them.
